name: make_phone_call
description: Make a real phone call on the user's behalf by BRIEFING a separate AI voice agent (via the TG200 cellular gateway) that has the live voice conversation for you — you are NOT on the call yourself. This is the tool for 'call X', 'phone X', 'give X a call'.

phone_number.description: Phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +15551234567) or 10-digit US format

role.description: The PERSONA/CHARACTER for the AI voice agent — define WHO they are. This becomes the agent's system prompt before the call starts.

greeting.description: The TASK INSTRUCTIONS — WHAT to do on this specific call. The voice agent speaks this greeting first, then has a free-form conversation.

backend.description: AI voice backend for the real-time conversation

notes: Use 'role' to define WHO the agent is (their persona) and 'greeting' for WHAT to accomplish on the call. Look up the contact number with search_contacts first.
